name: Al-Quds Natural Spring Water
description: Pure natural spring water sourced from protected underground springs. Crystal clear with balanced mineral content for perfect hydration.

name: Al-Quds Premium Mineral Water
description: Enriched with essential minerals from natural rock formations. A premium choice for health-conscious consumers.

name: Al-Quds Sparkling Water
description: Naturally carbonated water with fine, elegant bubbles. Perfect for dining and special occasions.

name: Al-Quds Cups
description: Convenient sealed cups for events, offices, and on-the-go hydration. Individually sealed for maximum freshness.

name: Al-Quds 5 Gallon
description: Large format refillable bottles for homes and offices. Compatible with standard water dispensers.

name: Al-Quds Flavored Water
description: Lightly flavored with natural fruit essences. Zero calories, zero sugar — pure refreshment.
